name: Lemon Chicken with Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles in a large pot of boiling water for 8 minutes, or until just tender. Drain and keep warm.
2. Pound the chicken breasts between sheets of paper and lightly pound to an even thickness.
3. In a small shallow container, mix the oil, lemon juice, paprika, and pepper.
4. Dredge the chicken in the mixture to coat both sides.
5. Heat a large frying pan over medium-high heat for one minute.
6. Add the chicken and cover. Cook for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the chicken is opaque; do not overcook.
7. Serve over the noodles.
Preparation time: 5 minutes
Cooking time: 15 minutes
Per serving calories: 5.9 g. fat (15% of calories), 4.5 g. dietary fiber, 66 mg. cholesterol, 99 mg. sodium.
